ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "surface_area" INTEGER /* Total land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "landlocked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the country is landlocked (true/false) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe East, Africa North) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "total_countries" INTEGER /* Total number of countries in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the indicators belong to */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicators are recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the demographic data belongs to */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population for the specified year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the specified year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the specified year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the specified year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who requested the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., 'generated', 'in_progress') */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
